title: lactuca scariola subsp. integrata
intro: Lactuca scariola subsp. integrata, also known as Wild Lettuce or Prickly Lettuce, is a subspecies of the Lactuca scariola plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and muscle cramps. The health benefits of Lactuca scarioca subsp. integrata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural pain reliever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
